title: Custom Content Packs
description: Custom Content Packs are a data driven way to create blocks, items, armor, tools, and food in minecraft!
body:
## This mod is Discontinued, I will not be working on this mod anymore.

Custom Content Packs are a data driven way to create blocks, items, armor, tools, and food in minecraft!

\
Check out the [wiki](https://ccpacks-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/) for what this mod can do, as well as how to set it up to use it!

\
 If youre feeling generous, [I have a PayPal set up for Donations](https://paypal.me/CCPacksDonations?locale.x=en_GB)
